description: Push Dagster run lifecycle metrics (duration / count / last-finished) to a Prometheus-compatible endpoint on every run completion. Targets Push Gateway, VictoriaMetrics import, or remote_write.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with the target base URL (push gateway / VM / Mimir endpoint).

location_label.label: Location Label
location_label.description: Label added to every pushed metric (deployment / region).

monitor_jobs.label: Monitor Jobs
monitor_jobs.description: Only emit metrics for these Dagster job names. None = all.
